```{r, setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(survey)
data_path_2000_2015 <- file.path("data", "NHTSA_databases", "NHTSA All files")
```


```{r load and join oi and oa}
# Helper function to process data for each year
process_year <- function(year) {
  # Load datasets (replace paths as necessary)
  oi <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "oi.sas7bdat")))
  oa <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "oa.sas7bdat")))
  gv <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "gv.sas7bdat")))
  ve <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "ve.sas7bdat")))
  accident <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "accident.sas7bdat")))

  # Injury processing
  injury_temp <- oi %>%
    mutate(
      BACK = ifelse(BODYREG == "B", 1, 0),
      NECK = ifelse(BODYREG == "N", 1, 0),
      CONCUSSION = ifelse(LESION == "K", 1, 0),
      AIS2 = ifelse(AIS >= 2 & AIS <= 6, 1, 0)
    )

  injury_summary <- injury_temp %>%
    group_by(PSU, CASENO, VEHNO, OCCNO) %>%
    summarise(
      BACK = max(BACK, na.rm = TRUE),
      NECK = max(NECK, na.rm = TRUE),
      CONCUSSION = max(CONCUSSION, na.rm = TRUE),
      AIS2 = max(AIS2, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Occupant data
  occ <- injury_summary %>%
    inner_join(oa, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO", "OCCNO")) %>%
    mutate(
      OI = 1,
      BELTED = ifelse(MANUSE %in% c(0, 1), 0, ifelse(MANUSE == 4, 1, NA)),
      AIRBAGS = ifelse(BAGDEPLY == 1, 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    filter(SEATPOS == 11 & AGE >= 16)

  # Vehicle data
  veh <- gv %>%
    inner_join(ve, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO")) %>%
    mutate(
      KEEP = ifelse(DOF1 %in% c(5, 6, 7, 25, 26, 27, 45, 46, 47, 65, 66, 67, 85, 86, 87) &
                    DOF2 %in% c(1, 11, 12, 21, 31, 32, 41, 51, 52, 61, 71, 72, 81, 91, 92), 1, 0),
      DV_MPH = DVTOTAL * 0.621371
    ) %>%
    filter(KEEP == 1)

  # Rear front temp
  rear_front_temp <- occ %>%
    inner_join(veh, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO"))

  # Rear front final
  rear_front <- rear_front_temp %>%
    inner_join(accident, by = c("PSU", "CASENO")) %>%
    filter(EVENTS == 2)

  return(rear_front)
}

new_result <- process_year(2000)

# Loop through years and process data
years <- 2000:2015
all_data <- lapply(years, process_year)
rear_front_combined <- bind_rows(all_data)

# Final adjustments
rear_front_combined <- rear_front_combined %>%
  mutate(
    BACK = ifelse(BACK < 1, 0, BACK),
    NECK = ifelse(NECK < 1, 0, NECK),
    CONCUSSION = ifelse(CONCUSSION < 1, 0, CONCUSSION),
    AIS2 = ifelse(AIS2 < 1, 0, AIS2),
    OI = ifelse(OI < 1, 0, OI),
    INJURED = ifelse(OI == 1 | MAIS > 0 | INJNUM > 0, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(INJURED = ifelse(
    (MAIS == 0 & INJNUM == 0) &
      (TREATMNT %in% c(1, 2) | DEATH > 0 | INJSEV == 4 |
       TREATMNT %in% c(3, 5, 6, 7, 8) | (TREATMNT == 4 & INJSEV > 0) |
       MEDFACIL %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8)), 1, INJURED
  ))

# Survey design setup
svydesign_data <- svydesign(
  ids = ~PSU,
  strata = ~PSUSTRAT,
  weights = ~RATWGT,
  data = rear_front_combined
)

# Analysis examples
svymean(~DV_MPH, design = svydesign_data)
svyby(~INJURED, ~YEAR, design = svydesign_data, svymean)

# Logistic regression
logistic_model <- svyglm(
  BACK ~ DV_MPH + I(DV_MPH^2),
  design = svydesign_data,
  family = quasibinomial()
)

summary(logistic_model)
```
